---
title: "Oscar Su"
subtitle: "Data Scientist & Game Developer"
image: "imgs/personal_photo.JPEG"
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/oscarshs/"
      icon: linkedin
    - text: GitHub
      url: "https://github.com/DubiousDuck"
      icon: github
    - text: E-mail
      url: "mailto:oscar517730@gmail.com"
      icon: inbox-fill
---
Hello, I'm Oscar. I've studied Statistics & Data Science and Cognitive Science, and somewhere along the way I picked up a habit of asking questions and building something useful from them.

I care a lot about making things that work well for the people using them. Whether it's producing business recommendations from geospatial and time-series data, running regression and NLP models to understand how people perceive visual scenes, or designing game systems where player feedback directly shapes what gets built next, I try to make sure the end result is clear, intentional, and worth someone's time.

Feel free to browse my projects and games from the menu, or reach out through any of the platforms below.
